subject: burying and arming a spiked powder charge in sand — a muffled shuffle then a metal click-latch
prompt: Close, muffled sand-sweep and gritty hands dragging—dry, sun-baked grains shifting; a brief hollow scoop into compacted sand; then a tense, tactile metallic click-latch and short resonant spike ratchet—short, weighty, grounded, 1.2–1.6s.
